Package org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences

Class AbstractFieldPreferenceAndPropertyPage

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.DialogPage
org.eclipse.jface.preference.PreferencePage
org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.AbstractEventBPreferencePage
org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.AbstractFieldPreferenceAndPropertyPage
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.IDialogPage, org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.IMessageProvider, org.eclipse.jface.preference.IPreferencePage, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPreferencePage, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPropertyPage
Direct Known Subclasses:
PostAutoTacticPreferencePage, PrefixPreferencePage
public abstract class AbstractFieldPreferenceAndPropertyPage extends AbstractEventBPreferencePage implements org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPropertyPage, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPreferencePage
Class used to create a page for both workbench preferences and project relative properties page. It uses a scoped store on the concerned project that save the properties. This class is intended to be sub-classed.

      • IWorkbenchPropertyPage.getElement()

    • isPropertyPage

      public boolean isPropertyPage()
      Returns true if this instance represents a property page (i.e. a project is set as owner).
      Returns:
      true for property pages, false for preference pages
